canRegister(address).notice: Check if user is eligible to register as candidate

canServeNextTerm(address).notice: Public function to check term limit eligibility

refreshCouncil(address[]).notice: Called periodically off-chain or by DAO keepers to remove members who fell below score. M-2 Fix: Also updates currentCouncil array for consistency

removeCouncilMember(address,string).notice: Remove council member for breaking VFIDE laws or falling below ProofScore 7000 (70%) Can be called immediately without waiting for refresh
